package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_single_record_write_without_rows_affected_check: Single-record-oriented repository updates or deletes that never inspect `RowsAffected` or an equivalent write-outcome signal.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule136NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule136NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule136NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario136Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule136NegativeService, input Rule136NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
